attendee_01.name: Attendee Jamie
attendee_01.dialogBefore:
This is my first Rails conf!
I keep running into bugs!
attendee_01.dialogAfter:
Wow, you really squashed
that bug...

attendee_02.name: Attendee Morgan
attendee_02.dialogBefore:
I've been writing Rails
for six months now.
Can you handle my bugs?
attendee_02.dialogAfter:
Back to the tutorials
for me...

attendee_03.name: Attendee Riley
attendee_03.dialogBefore:
My code has 100% coverage
but bugs keep slipping through!
Can your gems squash them?

speaker_01.name: Speaker Taylor
speaker_01.dialogBefore:
I'm giving a talk on
performance optimization.
Check out these nasty bugs!
speaker_01.dialogAfter:
You optimized your way
right through those...

speaker_02.name: Speaker Alex
speaker_02.dialogBefore:
Full-stack means I've got
bugs for every layer!

speaker_03.name: Speaker Sam
speaker_03.dialogBefore:
I've been in the Rails
community for 15 years.
These bugs will crush you!
speaker_03.dialogAfter:
Clean code. I'd approve
that PR.

test_minion_01.name: TDD Enthusiast Pat
test_minion_01.dialogBefore:
Red, green, refactor!
But first, squash this bug!
test_minion_01.dialogAfter:
My bug got squashed...
Time to refactor.

test_minion_05.name: Attendee Avery
test_minion_05.dialogBefore:
I just found my first bug!
Want to see it?
test_minion_05.dialogAfter:
Ok that bug didn't
stand a chance...

test_minion_02.name: Attendee Quinn
test_minion_02.dialogBefore:
I found some bugs in
my code! Let me throw
them at you!
test_minion_02.dialogAfter:
I guess I need better
gems to squash those...

test_minion_03.name: QA Advocate Lee
test_minion_03.dialogBefore:
No code ships without
fixing these bugs first.
Not on my watch!
test_minion_03.dialogAfter:
Your gems handled those
bugs impressively...

test_minion_04.name: Mock Master Drew
test_minion_04.dialogBefore:
I've collected the nastiest
testing bugs around.
Let me unleash them!
test_minion_04.dialogAfter:
You squashed them all...
Maybe I mocked too much
and missed real bugs.

organizer_01.name: Organizer Jordan
organizer_01.dialogBefore:
I organized this whole
conference. Think your gems
can handle the worst bugs?
